message.content:
@startuml
participant "producer" as producer
participant "consumer" as consumer
participant "broker" as broker
participant "NameServer" as ns1
participant "NameServer" as ns2

== NameServer 启动流程 ==

producer -> ns1 : 1 启动 NameServer 服务器
activate ns1
ns1 -> ns1 : 2 启动监听
note right of ns1
  监听 broker 链接
  监听 producer 链接
  监听 consumer 链接
end note
ns1 -> ns1 : 3
ns1 --> producer : 4
deactivate ns1

== broker 启动流程 ==

producer -> broker : 5 启动 broker 服务器
activate broker
broker -> ns1 : 6 每个 broker 与 每个 NameServer 建立长链接
activate ns1
ns1 --> broker : 7
deactivate ns1
broker --> producer : 8
broker -> ns1 : 9 每 30 秒发送心跳
deactivate broker

== producer 启动/发消息流程 ==

producer -> producer : 10 启动
activate producer
producer -> ns1 : 11 先与一台 NameServer 建立长链接
activate ns1
ns1 --> producer : 12
producer -> ns1 : 13 获取路由信息，获取 topic 与 broker queue 的对应关系
ns1 --> producer : 14
deactivate ns1
producer --> producer : 15
producer -> ns1 : 16 每 30 秒更新一次路由信息
deactivate producer

producer -> producer : 17 发送消息
activate producer
producer -> broker : 18 随机选择一个 queue，并发送消息
activate broker
broker --> producer : 19
deactivate broker
producer --> producer : 20
deactivate producer

== consumer 启动/pull消息流程 ==

consumer -> consumer : 21 启动
activate consumer
consumer -> ns1 : 22 与一台 NameServer 建立长链接
activate ns1
ns1 --> consumer : 23
consumer -> ns1 : 24 获取 topic 的路由信息
ns1 --> consumer : 25
deactivate ns1
consumer -> broker : 26 建立长链接并获取 queue
activate broker
broker --> consumer : 27
deactivate broker
consumer --> consumer : 28
consumer -> broker : 29 每 30 秒发送心跳，确保 broker 存活
consumer -> ns1 : 30 每 30 秒更新路由信息

consumer -> consumer : 31 消息消费
activate consumer
consumer -> broker : 32 拉取消息消费
activate broker
broker --> consumer : 33
deactivate broker
consumer --> consumer : 34
deactivate consumer
deactivate consumer

@enduml
